hero.title: RESOL Energies:
hero.subtitle: "Because energy transition doesn't stop at an audit report, we drive your strategy from the inside."
hero.description: Through a regular time package, we become your single point of contact to coordinate all your energy challenges.

services.title: A referent mission that
services.subtitle: This referent mission encompasses and coordinates our areas of expertise, which you can also request independently.

service1.title: Strategy, Studies & Diagnostics
service1.description: Build an energy strategy tailored to your assets for a clear and objective vision.
service1.details: Complete inventory (buildings, street lighting, vehicle fleet), consumption analysis and action prioritisation.
service1.example: Rather than renovating at random, we identify the most energy-intensive building in your portfolio to focus your investments where returns are fastest.

service2.title: Monitoring & Consumption Tracking
service2.description: Drive ongoing actions and track the real evolution of your consumption.
service2.details: Setting up simple indicators for elected officials and technicians, regular monitoring and configuration of sustainable management tools.
service2.example: Monthly consumption analysis detects an immediate drift due to a heating misconfiguration, avoiding unnecessary extra costs at year end.

service3.title: Project Owner Assistance (AMO)
service3.description: Concrete actions towards energy sobriety, from strategy to implementation.
service3.details: Support during renovations, HVAC studies (heating, ventilation, air conditioning), low-tech solutions and usage optimisation.
service3.example: When replacing a boiler, we help you validate the system best suited to your needs, ensuring the delivered works match your savings objectives.

service4.title: Regulatory Compliance
service4.description: Secure your organisation against growing legal obligations.
service4.details: Identification of subject assets and compliance with decrees (Eco-energy tertiary/OPERAT, BACS, Energy Efficiency Directive).
service4.example: We handle the annual data entry on the OPERAT platform for the Tertiary Decree, sparing you sanctions and reputational risk from "Name & Shame".

service5.title: Training & Awareness
service5.description: Train your staff in energy management to become autonomous.
service5.details: Awareness sessions on energy management and ecological transition tailored to your context.
service5.example: On-site training to teach your technical teams how to optimise Building Management System (BMS) settings without sacrificing occupant comfort.

custom.title: Need something else?
custom.description: Can't find what you need? Contact us for personalised solutions tailored to your requirements.

whyReferent.title: Why choose the
whyReferent.paragraph1: Each of these missions can be carried out on an ad-hoc basis. However, by choosing RESOL Energies as your Energy Referent, you benefit from overall coherence: your diagnostics feed your monitoring, your works comply with regulations and your staff are continuously trained.
whyReferent.paragraph2: It's the assurance of an energy transition that progresses every month, without burdening your payroll.
whyReferent.benefit1Desc: You benefit from a dedicated expert who knows your assets, your equipment and your constraints inside out.
whyReferent.benefit2Desc: No more stagnating files. Your energy transition progresses smoothly every month, without interruption, even when your teams are busy elsewhere.
whyReferent.benefit3Desc: Consulting costs spread over the year for better financial visibility, along with priority assistance for all your urgent needs.
whyReferent.ctaTitle: Make energy a performance lever, not a constraint.
whyReferent.ctaText: In a context of price volatility and tightening regulations, energy should no longer be a budgetary inevitability. By choosing RESOL Energies as your Energy Referent, you transform complex management into a controlled trajectory. We don't just deliver reports: we work alongside you to optimise your consumption, capture available funding (grants, CEE) and secure your energy future.

clients.title: Expertise adapted to
clients.subtitle: Whether you are a local authority, a company or an individual, we tailor our approach to your specific challenges.

collectivites.title: Local Authorities
collectivites.description: Municipalities, inter-municipal bodies, departments and regions looking to optimise their public assets and reduce energy costs.

entreprises.title: Businesses
entreprises.description: SMEs, mid-caps and large groups seeking to control their energy costs and improve their environmental performance.

particuliers.title: Individuals
particuliers.description: Homeowners and co-owners wishing to improve the comfort of their homes while reducing their bills.

contact.title: Ready to take back control of
contact.subtitle: Let's meet to define the level of support suited to your needs and build a strategy that makes sense together.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Briefly describe your project or needs...

expertProfile.title: Senior expertise at the crossroads of science, technology and territories.
expertProfile.description: Marc Ribera Fuentes supports local authorities as a Dedicated Energy Officer, relying on a triple legitimacy: scientific, technical and institutional. This rare combination allows him to facilitate dialogue between climate strategy, energy engineering and operational constraints of services.

scientificPillar.title: Scientific pillar
scientificPillar.details: Doctoral thesis on the development of tools for assessing the environmental behavior of territories, at the Autonomous University of Barcelona (UAB).

technicalPillar.title: Technical pillar
technicalPillar.degree: Master Renewable Energy & Energy Efficiency – CIRCE
technicalPillar.details: Specialization in design and optimization of energy systems, at the Research Center for Energy Resources and Consumption (CIRCE).

institutionalPillar.title: Institutional pillar
institutionalPillar.degree: 10+ years at the heart of public energy policies
institutionalPillar.details: Operational experience within Perpignan Méditerranée Métropole, the City of Colomiers, the ACVI Community of Communes and the Val-de-Marne Department, on energy strategy, solar cadastres, sobriety and heritage renovation.

strategicProjects.title: Concrete proof on the ground
strategicProjects.description: Each project illustrates a senior energy officer positioning: ability to structure data, dialogue with general management and transform diagnostics into operational decisions.
strategicProjects.networks: Networks: TOTEN Occitanie, CARTE, press & local authorities

cadastrePmm.label: Solar Cadastre & RE Potential – Perpignan Méditerranée Métropole
cadastrePmm.role: Initiation, framing and technical steering for the 36 communes
cadastrePmm.description: Implementation of the solar cadastre and study of the maximum renewable energy potential of the territory, referenced in the SDG program of PMM.

laroqueDiagnostic.label: Energy Sobriety – Global Diagnostic Laroque-des-Albères
laroqueDiagnostic.role: Energy AMO & coordination with local press
laroqueDiagnostic.description: Support for the municipality in defining a sobriety trajectory, highlighted in the local press (L'Indépendant).
laroqueDiagnostic.mockupAlt: Simulated screenshot: press article on energy sobriety.

courOasis.label: Courtyard Oasis – Saint-Génis-des-Fontaines
courOasis.role: Technical officer recognized by the CARTE network
courOasis.description: Courtyard oasis project followed by the national CARTE network, as an example of urban cooling, summer comfort and co-construction with users.
courOasis.mockupAlt: Simulated screenshot: press article on a courtyard oasis.

oddPmm.label: SDG Program – PMM
oddPmm.role: Contribution to RE potential diagnosis and climate trajectory
oddPmm.description: Integration of energy diagnosis and RE potential in the SDG program of Perpignan Méditerranée Métropole.
oddPmm.mockupAlt: Simulated screenshot: PDF excerpt from the SDG program (RE potential diagnosis).

citoyenr.label: Citizen photovoltaic power plants – Citoy'enR
citoyenr.role: Support for the scaling up of citizen projects
citoyenr.description: Strategic support for citizen photovoltaic power plants, articulation with territorial energy policies.
citoyenr.mockupAlt: Simulated screenshot: publication announcing a citizen photovoltaic power plant.

footer.description: Your partner for a successful energy transition. Consulting and support for local authorities, businesses and individuals.
